name: Won-Ton Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground pork, beaten egg, soy sauce, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Fill the wontons with the mixture.
3. Bring a large pot of water to a boil and add the wontons. Cook until they float to the top.
4. Remove the wontons from the boiling water using tongs or a slotted spoon.
5. Heat the chicken broth in another pot over medium heat.
6. Add the chopped shallots and additional soy sauce to the hot broth.
7. Gently lower the cooked wontons into the soup, letting them simmer for about 1 minute.
8. Serve the won-ton soup in bowls, garnished with extra soy sauce if desired.
